name: Fuzzing Setup V2 Workflow
description: Setup V2: Migration, scaffolding, implementation, and validation

steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration
steps.description: Migrate Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation.

steps.name: Ensure Dependencies Installed
steps.description: Detect dependency manager and install dependencies if missing
steps.prompt: if [ -f soldeer.lock ] || grep -q '\[soldeer\]' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Detected soldeer project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 forge soldeer install || echo 'soldeer install timed out or failed, continuing...'; fi; if [ -f .gitmodules ]; then echo 'Detected git submodule project, installing dependencies...'; git submodule update --init --recursive; forge install --no-commit || echo 'forge install failed, continuing...'; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then echo 'Detected pnpm project, installing dependencies...'; command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm; timeout 120 pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then echo 'Detected yarn project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 yarn install; else echo 'Detected npm project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 npm install --loglevel=error; fi || echo 'Package install failed or timed out, continuing...'; fi; if [ ! -d lib/forge-std ]; then echo 'Installing forge-std...'; forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit; fi; echo 'Verifying compilation...'; forge build

steps.name: Suppress Lint on Build
steps.description: Disable forge linter during build to prevent lint warnings in third-party code from blocking scaffolding
steps.prompt:
if ! grep -q '\[lint\]' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then printf '
[lint]
lint_on_build = false
' >> foundry.toml; elif ! grep -q 'lint_on_build' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then sed -i '/\[lint\]/a lint_on_build = false' foundry.toml; else sed -i 's/lint_on_build = true/lint_on_build = false/' foundry.toml; fi; echo 'lint_on_build set to false in foundry.toml'

steps.name: Validate Mock Names
steps.description: Validate mocked_contracts against .recon/out ABIs; strip trailing Mock suffix if needed; remove unknowns
steps.prompt: SCAFFOLD_FILE=$([ -f magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json ] && echo 'magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json' || echo '../magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json'); OUT_DIR=".recon/out"; mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"; if [ -z "$(ls -A "$OUT_DIR" 2>/dev/null)" ]; then PROFILE=$(grep -q '^\[profile\.recon\]' "${RECON_FOUNDRY_ROOT}/foundry.toml" 2>/dev/null && echo 'recon' || echo ''); env ${PROFILE:+FOUNDRY_PROFILE=$PROFILE} forge build --build-info --out "$OUT_DIR" || true; fi; MOCK_COUNT=$(jq '.mocked_contracts | length' "$SCAFFOLD_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$MOCK_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then NEW_MOCKS='[]'; for name in $(jq -r '.mocked_contracts[]' "$SCAFFOLD_FILE"); do if find "$OUT_DIR" -name "${name}.json" ! -path '*/build-info/*' 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then NEW_MOCKS=$(printf '%s' "$NEW_MOCKS" | jq --arg n "$name" '. + [$n]'); else stripped="${name%Mock}"; if [ "$stripped" != "$name" ] && find "$OUT_DIR" -name "${stripped}.json" ! -path '*/build-info/*' 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo "Renamed: $name -> $stripped"; NEW_MOCKS=$(printf '%s' "$NEW_MOCKS" | jq --arg n "$stripped" '. + [$n]'); else echo "WARNING: No ABI for $name, removing"; fi; fi; done; jq --argjson m "$NEW_MOCKS" '.mocked_contracts = $m' "$SCAFFOLD_FILE" > "${SCAFFOLD_FILE}.tmp" && mv "${SCAFFOLD_FILE}.tmp" "$SCAFFOLD_FILE"; echo "Validated mocked_contracts: $NEW_MOCKS"; fi

steps.name: Generate Recon Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate fuzzing scaffolding based on contracts-to-scaffold.json
steps.prompt: SCAFFOLD_FILE=$([ -f magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json ] && echo 'magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json' || echo '../magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json'); MOCK_NAMES=$(jq -r 'if .mocked_contracts | length > 0 then [.mocked_contracts[] | sub("Mock$"; "")] | join(",") else empty end' $SCAFFOLD_FILE); PROFILE=$(grep -q '^\[profile\.recon\]' "${RECON_FOUNDRY_ROOT}/foundry.toml" 2>/dev/null && echo 'recon' || echo ''); env ${PROFILE:+FOUNDRY_PROFILE=$PROFILE} npm_config_cache=/tmp/npm-cache npx -y recon-generate@latest --include "$(jq -r '.source_contracts | join(",")' $SCAFFOLD_FILE)" ${MOCK_NAMES:+--mock "$MOCK_NAMES"} --force

steps.name: Clean Flattened Imports
steps.description: Remove imports of flattened contracts from scaffolding to prevent identifier collisions
steps.prompt: ROOT=${RECON_FOUNDRY_ROOT:-.}; FLATTENED=$(find "$ROOT/src" -name '*.flattened.sol' -o -name '*.flat.sol' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FLATTENED" ]; then echo 'Found flattened contracts, cleaning imports from scaffolding...'; for f in $FLATTENED; do BASENAME=$(basename "$f"); echo "  Removing imports of $BASENAME from test/recon/"; find "$ROOT/test/recon" -name '*.sol' -exec sed -i "/$BASENAME/d" {} +; done; find "$ROOT/test/recon" -name '*.sol' -exec sed -i '/flattened\//d' {} +; echo 'Flattened import cleanup done.'; else echo 'No flattened contracts found, skipping cleanup.'; fi

steps.name: Phase 1: Install Dependencies and Create Mocks
steps.description: Install chimera, create remaining mock contracts, and verify compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 2: Implement Setup.sol
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-2 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Fix Import Collisions
steps.description: Safety net: detect and fix any remaining duplicate identifier errors from conflicting imports
steps.prompt:
Run `forge build`. If it compiles cleanly, report success and stop — do nothing else.

If you see `Error (2333): Identifier already declared`, fix the collisions in `test/recon/` files:
1. Read the error output to identify which import lines cause each collision
2. Check whether the colliding import is actually used by setup() or handler logic — if it is not used, remove the import line entirely
3. If both colliding imports are needed, refactor to named imports with aliases, for example: `import {IPair as FirebirdIPair} from "contracts/interfaces/IFirebird.sol";`
4. Re-run `forge build` and repeat up to 3 times until compilation is clean

Only fix `Error (2333): Identifier already declared` — do not touch other compilation errors, those are handled by the next phase.

steps.name: Phase 3: Validate Setup
steps.description: Validate setup with forge build, forge test, and echidna
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-3.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-3 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Auto-Link Libraries
steps.prompt: MEDUSA_STUB=0; test -f medusa.json || { echo '{}' > medusa.json; MEDUSA_STUB=1; }; npm_config_cache=/tmp/npm-cache npx -y recon-generate@latest link2; rc=$?; [ $MEDUSA_STUB -eq 1 ] && rm -f medusa.json; exit $rc

steps.name: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all target handler functions from scaffolded code

steps.name: Phase 5: Identify Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Analyze each handler and identify prerequisite functions
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-5.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-5 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Order Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Sort functions by prerequisite count for testing order

steps.name: Phase 6: Move Admin Functions
steps.description: Identify and move admin functions to AdminTargets
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-6.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-6 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 7: Write Unit Tests
steps.description: Write unit tests for all handlers to validate setup
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-7.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-7 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Final Echidna Validation
steps.description: Run Echidna to validate complete setup
steps.prompt: (set -o pipefail; echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --test-limit 10000 2>&1 | tee magic/echidna-output.txt; echo "ECHIDNA_EXIT_CODE=$?" > magic/echidna-exit-code.txt) || true

steps.name: Setup V2 Completion Summary
steps.description: Generate final summary of setup completion
steps.prompt:
Create a file called FUZZING_SETUP_COMPLETE.md that summarizes:
1. Successfully completed all phases
2. List key artifacts: Setup.sol, target-functions.json, function-sequences.json, admin-functions.json
3. Confirm forge build compiles successfully
4. Confirm forge test runs without reverts
5. Confirm echidna runs without setup crashes
6. Next steps: proceed to Coverage workflow
